name: G0RILLAZ [updated version]
description:
Ok so my Gorillaz hyperfixation is back and BITING MEEE IN THE ASS, I know y'all glad to have me back 😞😌 basically this is similar to my past Gorillaz bot except I have tried my ULMOST BEST (ok like.., 85% best) to make this bot as interactive, fun and accurate to the characters as possible, the past bots just would act glitchy for some reason and while I AM ABSOLUTELY going to update those bots I just feel so much frustration over trying to edit the same thing 100 times and it still acting off, I THINK its because of the way the characters talk in interviews? And since I was rewriting it and basing it off of that it made them act too "cartoony" yk? I'm also thinking of separating the phase 4 and 5 not because rn its a mess, rest assure I'm on it, until then hopefully this one will feel like a actual roleplay bot

Byeee
creator: Drewkittybitty
